scenes.title: Escape in the Rain
scenes.summary: Oolong slips out of a biotech lab and follows the smell of roasted oolong through rainy Portland toward Steep Endings.

shots.prompt: Whimsical indie comedy opening: rainy Portland biotech service alley at night, blue security lights, steam vents, a polite sign reading Authorized Personnel Please, cozy absurd mood, cinematic pastel teal and amber.
Oolong, a gentle feathered Velociraptor with moss-green and chestnut plumage and curious amber eyes, carefully nudges open a lab loading door with one claw, non-scary, bashful physical comedy.
Close-up of Oolong's nostrils catching a ribbon of fragrant tea steam drifting impossibly across the rainy alley, visible scent trails like delicate watercolor swirls.
Devon Pike in a too-clean gray windbreaker stumbles into the alley holding a clipboard and a tiny tranquilizer case, looking panicked but polite, rain beading on glasses.
Oolong tiptoes behind recycling bins with exaggerated delicacy despite being huge, tail lifting to avoid knocking over bottles, silent-film comedian timing.
Wide shot: Oolong follows warm golden tea-shop light at the end of the rainy street, Portland bicycles and umbrellas passing, whimsical storybook mood.

scenes.title: The Failing Shop
scenes.summary: Mara closes her empty tea shop with dry resignation until an impossible visitor crashes gently into her back room.

shots.prompt: Interior Steep Endings Tea Shop: mismatched chairs, foggy windows, hanging plants, shelves of tea tins, empty tables, warm amber practical lighting, cozy but failing.
Mara Bell, rumpled linen apron and tired eyes, flips a chalkboard sign from Open to Technically Open, sarcastic exhaustion in a quiet Portland tea shop.
Close-up: Mara counts a few coins beside overdue bills and a framed photo partly hidden behind tea tins, grief shown softly, no melodrama.
Back room door bulges as Oolong squeezes in with careful embarrassment, knocking only one tiny teaspoon to the floor, gentle dinosaur comedy.
Mara freezes with a kettle in hand, staring at Oolong; Oolong freezes too while wearing a burlap tea sack accidentally like a scarf, absurd deadpan moment.
Two-shot in cramped back room: Mara points the kettle like a weapon, Oolong slowly offers a fallen tea tin with apologetic amber eyes, heartwarming non-scary tone.

scenes.title: The Nose Knows
scenes.summary: Mara discovers Oolong can diagnose and compose tea blends with impossible precision, creating a cup that astonishes June.

shots.prompt: Oolong leans over rows of tea tins in the back room, sniffing with refined concentration like a Michelin sommelier, claw hovering delicately above labels.
Macro shot: Oolong's claw precisely combines oolong leaves, bergamot peel, smoked pear, and tiny lavender buds on a brass scale, tactile cozy details.
Mara watches skeptical but intrigued, arms crossed, eyebrow raised, warm kettle steam curling between her and Oolong like a truce flag.
June Alvarez enters with bright glasses and a raincoat, startled by a mysterious thump from the back but more interested in gossip and tea.
June tastes Oolong's secret blend at the counter; her eyes widen with comic revelation, steam glowing gold around her face, Mara trying not to smile.
Exterior through foggy window: June excitedly texts neighbors while Mara peeks toward the back room where Oolong gives a shy little proud chirp.

scenes.title: Portland Discovers the Blend
scenes.summary: A tiny line forms as the secret tea becomes a neighborhood sensation, while Devon searches clumsily nearby.

shots.prompt: Morning at Steep Endings: rain-slick sidewalk, a small quirky line of Portland customers with umbrellas and bicycles gathers under warm shop lights.
Inside, Mara takes orders with renewed dry humor, chalkboard now reads Mystery Blend: Don't Ask, cozy indie comedy bustle.
Back room assembly line: Oolong gently sniffs cups through the serving hatch and adjusts each blend with precise claw pinches, chef-like elegance.
Montage-like shot of customers reacting warmly: one laughs, one tears up, one hugs a mug, each surrounded by distinct colored steam swirls.
Devon Pike peers through the foggy front window holding a biotech missing-asset flyer, confused by the cheerful tea crowd and hand-lettered menu.
Oolong accidentally sneezes powdered matcha into a perfect green cloud shaped like a tiny dinosaur; Mara and Oolong share their first genuine laugh.

scenes.title: Perfect Oolong
scenes.summary: Mara chooses to protect Oolong, turns Devon away with wit, and begins a new partnership built on tea and second chances.

shots.prompt: Devon enters Steep Endings, overly official and damp, asking awkward questions while Mara calmly wipes the counter with weaponized customer-service politeness.
From behind the shelf, Oolong hides among tall tea tins and hanging plants, amber eyes visible, trying adorably not to breathe too loudly.
Mara serves Devon an intimidatingly perfect cup labeled Compliance Blend; Devon tastes it and forgets his question in blissful confusion.
Quiet back room moment: Mara shows Oolong the half-hidden framed photo, grief softening; Oolong gently nudges a comforting mug toward her.
Mara updates the chalkboard menu: New Partner Blend, tiny claw mark beside her handwriting; Oolong watches proudly from the shadowed doorway.
Final warm wide shot: Steep Endings glowing in Portland rain, Mara and Oolong silhouetted inside brewing tea together, whimsical heartfelt pilot ending, zero scary energy.
